topPicks.name: Party Jollof Rice
topPicks.desc: Smoky, slow-cooked tomato rice with a rich blend of West African spices, served with fried plantain.

topPicks.name: Goat Pepper Soup
topPicks.desc: A bold, aromatic broth loaded with tender goat meat and traditional Nigerian pepper soup spices.

topPicks.name: Beef Suya Skewers
topPicks.desc: Flame-grilled beef skewers coated in a spiced groundnut rub, served with sliced onions and tomatoes.

topPicks.name: Puff Puff
topPicks.desc: Light, golden deep-fried dough balls dusted with sugar — a beloved Nigerian street-food classic.

meals.name: Fried Rice & Chicken
meals.desc: Fragrant fried rice cooked with mixed vegetables and served with crispy grilled chicken.

meals.name: Jollof Rice & Chicken
meals.desc: Smoky party jollof with grilled chicken and fried plantain on the side.

meals.name: Dodo & Egg
meals.desc: Sweet fried plantain served with a spiced egg sauce — a Nigerian comfort classic.

meals.name: Suya Platter
meals.desc: Spiced skewered beef with sliced onions, tomatoes and yaji spice blend.

meals.name: Nkwobi
meals.desc: Spiced cow foot cooked in a rich palm oil sauce with utazi leaves.

meals.name: Puff Puff
meals.desc: Light, golden deep-fried dough balls dusted with sugar — a beloved street-food classic.

soups.name: Goat Pepper Soup
soups.desc: Light, fiery broth with tender goat meat and aromatic pepper soup spices.

soups.name: Afang Soup & Eba
soups.desc: Afang leaves and waterleaf cooked with assorted seafood, served with eba.

soups.name: Ofe Onugbu
soups.desc: Bitter leaf soup slow-cooked with oxtail, assorted meat and crayfish.

soups.name: Afia Efere
soups.desc: A delicate white soup from the Efik people, cooked with fresh fish and cocoyam.

soups.name: Egusi Soup
soups.desc: Rich melon seed soup cooked with assorted meat, stockfish and leafy greens.

soups.name: Banga Soup
soups.desc: Palm nut soup with oxtail and banga spices, served with starch or pounded yam.

drinks.name: Zobo Royale
drinks.desc: Chilled hibiscus drink infused with ginger, pineapple and a hint of cloves.

drinks.name: Chapman
drinks.desc: Classic Nigerian cocktail with Fanta, Sprite, Angostura bitters and cucumber.

drinks.name: Palm Wine
drinks.desc: Freshly tapped, lightly fermented and naturally sweet palm wine served chilled.

drinks.name: Kunu Aya
drinks.desc: A smooth, creamy tiger nut drink blended with dates and coconut.

drinks.name: Fura da Nono
drinks.desc: Chilled fermented milk blended with millet balls, ginger and spices.

drinks.name: Bissap Lemonade
drinks.desc: Hibiscus and lemon juice over ice with a sprig of fresh mint.
